definitions.text: That which one is morally or legally obligated to do.
examples: Do your duty by me! -No, we don't have a duty to keep you abreast.

definitions.text: The state of being at work and responsible for or doing a particular task.
examples: I’m on duty from 6 pm to 6 am.

definitions.text: An excise tax; especially, one on imports or exports.
